title: LASI Closes Flat at 25,689.97 — Low Activity Session
summary: The Lusaka All Share Index closed unchanged. 1,025 trades across the board with ATEL dominating value traded at ZMW 8.12M. 8 listed stocks recorded zero shares traded.

title: BoZ Holds Policy Rate at 13.5% Ahead of August Elections
summary: The Bank of Zambia maintained its policy rate at 13.5%, citing stabilizing inflation at 7.5% but cautioning on global energy price risks from the Iran conflict.

title: Zambia Posts Record Bumper Harvest — Maize Output Exceeds 4M Tonnes
summary: The Ministry of Agriculture confirmed a record maize harvest exceeding 4 million metric tonnes for the 2025/2026 season, driven by favorable rains and expanded FISP coverage.

title: Klapton Reinsurance IPO Oversubscribed — Lists March 2026
summary: Klapton Reinsurance confirmed its IPO was oversubscribed. The company, with K2.97B in gross written premiums and a Caa1 Moody's rating, is expected to list on LuSE Main Board this month.

title: Copper Prices Hold Above $10,000/tonne on AI Data Center Demand
summary: Copper prices continue to trade above $10,000/tonne, supported by AI data center buildout and EV manufacturing demand. Zambia's 2025 output hit a record 890,346 metric tonnes.

title: IMF Successor Programme Talks Progress — Staff Visit Scheduled July
summary: The IMF confirmed a staff visit to Lusaka in July 2026 to begin formal negotiations on a successor programme to the expired ECF. Government emphasizes 'growth-focused agenda.'

title: Zambia Sugar Crosses $1B Market Cap — But Daily Volume Remains Thin
summary: Zambia Sugar maintained its $1B+ valuation but continues to see extremely low trading volumes — just K89,926 traded on a recent session. 75% held by ABF.

title: DotCom Zambia Appoints New CTO — Signals SaaS Pivot
summary: DCZM announced the appointment of a new Chief Technology Officer with experience in fintech SaaS platforms, signaling a potential strategic pivot beyond toll processing.

title: Afreximbank Prices First Panda Bond After Fitch Exit
summary: Afreximbank successfully priced its inaugural Panda Bond on the Chinese interbank market, leveraging its AAA rating from China Chengxin (CCXI), marking a milestone in its pivot to Asian debt markets.

title: ZCCM-IH Announces Strategic Review of Mopani Copper Mines Stake
summary: ZCCM Investments Holdings confirmed it is undertaking a strategic review of its stake in Mopani Copper Mines. Potential outcomes include partial divestment or new strategic partnership.

title: CEC Renewables Secures $96.7M Green Bond for Solar Expansion
summary: CEC Renewables, a CECZ subsidiary, closed a $96.7M green bond issuance to fund solar-hybrid power projects for mining operations, targeting 200MW of new capacity by 2028.

title: Zambia's Yuan Mining Tax Channel — 6 Month Update Shows Growing Adoption
summary: The Bank of Zambia reported that yuan-denominated mining tax remittances have grown steadily since the October 2025 launch, with an increasing number of Chinese-operated mines utilizing the RMB corridor.

title: Airtel Zambia Reports 12% Revenue Growth — Mobile Money Drives Expansion
summary: Airtel Zambia reported 12% YoY revenue growth to ZMW 8.9B, driven by mobile money and data services. The company maintained its position as LuSE's most liquid counter.

title: Zambia's Debt-to-GDP Ratio Falls Below 70% — Finance Ministry
summary: The Ministry of Finance announced that Zambia's debt-to-GDP ratio has fallen below 70% following the successful restructuring, down from a peak of over 120% during the default period.

title: CECZ Wins Tender for 150MW Solar Plant at Lumwana Mine
summary: Copperbelt Energy Corporation won a competitive tender to build and operate a 150MW solar-hybrid plant for Barrick's Lumwana mine expansion, expected online by 2028.
